name: Colossal Fighter/Assault Mode
effectText: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate". When this card is Special Summoned: You can send up to 2 Warrior monsters from your Deck to the GY. All monsters your opponent controls lose 100 ATK for each Warrior monster in your GY. When this card on the field is destroyed: You can target 1 "Colossal Fighter" in your GY; Special Summon that target.
